question: Tampilkan transaksi e-nose yang terjadi pada hari dengan total transaksi terbanyak
predicted_sql: SELECT t1.user_key, t1.device_id, DATE(t1.date_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS total FROM transaction_enose t1 INNER JOIN (SELECT user_key, device_id, MAX(total) AS max_total FROM (SELECT user_key, device_id, COUNT(*) AS total FROM transaction_enose GROUP BY user_key, device_id) t2 GROUP BY user_key, device_id) t3 ON t1.user_key = t3.user_key AND t1.device_id = t3.device_id WHERE t1.total = t3.max_total GROUP BY t1.date_time ORDER BY t1.total DESC
